title: Low Level Design : Tic-Tac-Toe
summary: System designing is the process of designing system elements such as architectures, modules, components, different interfaces of those components. Its the process of defining the lowest level entities in a software. It is the backbone of any software.
content: System designing is the process of designing system elements such as architectures, modules, components, different interfaces of those components. Its the process of defining the lowest level entities in a software. It is the backbone of any software.
